---
title: "Lab 5"
author: ""
date: "Due on 04/17 at 11:59 PM"
output: pdf_document
urlcolor: blue
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Collaborators: Abhiram Bobba (akbobba2), Arnav Kethana (kethana2), Kavin Mohan (kavinm2), Shyam Peden (speden2), Rohan Nadkarni (rohansn2)

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(Lahman)
library(tidyverse)
library(retrosheet)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(reshape2)
library(baseballr)
library(knitr)
library(shiny)
library(DT)
```


```{r, warning=FALSE, messafe=FALSE}
## load in dataset
raw_pitchers <- read_csv("raw_pitcher_fangraphs_2024.csv")

head(raw_pitchers)
```
```{r}
positions <- c(
  "1B" = 3,
  "2B" = 4,
  "3B" = 5,
  "SS" = 6,
  "LF" = 7,
  "CF" = 8,
  "RF" = 9,
  "OF" = "of",
  "IF" = "if"
)

oaa_by_team_position_2025 <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(positions), function(pos_name) {
    statcast_leaderboards(
      leaderboard = "outs_above_average",
      year = 2025,
      fielding_type = "team",
      oaa_position = positions[[pos_name]],
      min_field = 0
    ) %>%
      mutate(position_group = pos_name)
  })
)

head(oaa_by_team_position_2025)
```

```{r}

oaa_summary <- oaa_by_team_position_2025 %>%
  mutate(
    side_group = case_when(
      position_group %in% c("3B", "SS") ~ "left_side",
      position_group %in% c("1B", "2B") ~ "right_side",
      position_group %in% c("LF", "CF", "RF") ~ "outfield",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(display_team_name) %>%
  summarise(
    
    # individual positions
    oaa_1B = sum(outs_above_average[position_group == "1B"], na.rm = TRUE),
    oaa_2B = sum(outs_above_average[position_group == "2B"], na.rm = TRUE),
    oaa_3B = sum(outs_above_average[position_group == "3B"], na.rm = TRUE),
    oaa_SS = sum(outs_above_average[position_group == "SS"], na.rm = TRUE),
    oaa_LF = sum(outs_above_average[position_group == "LF"], na.rm = TRUE),
    oaa_CF = sum(outs_above_average[position_group == "CF"], na.rm = TRUE),
    oaa_RF = sum(outs_above_average[position_group == "RF"], na.rm = TRUE),

    # grouped sides
    left_side_oaa = sum(
      outs_above_average[side_group == "left_side"],
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

    right_side_oaa = sum(
      outs_above_average[side_group == "right_side"],
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    
    infield_oaa = sum(
      outs_above_average[position_group %in% c("1B", "2B", "3B", "SS")],
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

    outfield_oaa = sum(
      outs_above_average[side_group == "outfield"],
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),

    total_oaa = sum(outs_above_average, na.rm = TRUE),

    .groups = "drop"
  )

head(oaa_summary)
```
```{r}
## save park factors 2024-2026 in a vector
park_factors <- c(
  "Rockies" = 112,
  "Twins" = 104,
  "D-backs" = 104,
  "Orioles" = 103,
  "Reds" = 103,
  "Phillies" = 102,
  "Dodgers" = 102,
  "Red Sox" = 102,
  "Yankees" = 102,
  "Nationals" = 101,
  "Astros" = 101,
  "Blue Jays" = 101,
  "Tigers" = 101,
  "Marlins" = 100,
  "Pirates" = 100,
  "Angels" = 100,
  "Royals" = 100,
  "Braves" = 100,
  "Mets" = 99,
  "Cardinals" = 98,
  "Guardians" = 98,
  "White Sox" = 98,
  "Giants" = 98,
  "Brewers" = 97,
  "Padres" = 97,
  "Cubs" = 95,
  "Rays" = 95,
  "Mariners" = 92,
  "Rangers" = 91
)
```

```{r}
team_lookup <- tibble(
  team_name = c(
    "ARI","ATL","BAL","BOS","CHC","CHW","CIN","CLE","COL","DET",
    "HOU","KCR","LAA","LAD","MIA","MIL","MIN","NYM","NYY","ATH",
    "PHI","PIT","SDP","SEA","SFG","STL","TBR","TEX","TOR","WSN"
  ),
  display_team_name = c(
    "D-backs","Braves","Orioles","Red Sox","Cubs","White Sox",
    "Reds","Guardians","Rockies","Tigers","Astros","Royals",
    "Angels","Dodgers","Marlins","Brewers","Twins","Mets",
    "Yankees","Athletics","Phillies","Pirates","Padres","Mariners",
    "Giants","Cardinals","Rays","Rangers","Blue Jays","Nationals"
  )
)

park_factors_df <- enframe(
  park_factors,
  name = "display_team_name",
  value = "park_factor"
)

park_factors_df <- enframe(
  park_factors,
  name = "display_team_name",
  value = "park_factor"
)

model_data <- raw_pitchers %>%
  left_join(team_lookup, by = "team_name") %>%
  left_join(oaa_summary, by = "display_team_name") %>%
  left_join(park_factors_df, by = "display_team_name")
head(model_data)
```
```{r}
write.csv(model_data, "model_data.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
## split data into train test
set.seed(42)

model_df <- model_data %>%
  select(
    PlayerName,
    BABIP,
    K_pct,
    BB_pct,
    GB_pct,
    FB_pct,
    LD_pct,
    Pull_pct,
    Hard_pct,
    left_side_oaa,
    right_side_oaa,
    infield_oaa,
    outfield_oaa,
    park_factor
  ) %>%
  na.omit()

train_idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(model_df)), size = 0.8 * nrow(model_df))

train <- model_df[train_idx, ]
test  <- model_df[-train_idx, ]
head(train)
```

```{r}
## run glm 
babip_model <- glm(
  BABIP ~
    K_pct +
    BB_pct +
    GB_pct +
    LD_pct +
    Hard_pct +
    left_side_oaa +
    right_side_oaa +
    outfield_oaa +
    park_factor,
  data = train,
  family = gaussian()
)

summary(babip_model)

test$predicted_babip <- predict(babip_model, newdata = test)

rmse <- sqrt(mean((test$BABIP - test$predicted_babip)^2))
mae <- mean(abs(test$BABIP - test$predicted_babip))

rmse
mae
```
```{r}
pitcher_name <- "Logan Webb"
new_team <- "Guardians"
new_park <- "Rockies"

pitcher_row <- model_data %>%
  filter(PlayerName == pitcher_name) %>%
  slice(1)

def_row <- oaa_summary %>%
  filter(display_team_name == new_team)

park_row <- park_factors_df %>%
  filter(display_team_name == new_park)

cf_row <- pitcher_row %>%
  mutate(
    left_side_oaa = def_row$left_side_oaa,
    right_side_oaa = def_row$right_side_oaa,
    outfield_oaa = def_row$outfield_oaa,
    park_factor = park_row$park_factor
  )

current_babip <- predict(babip_model, newdata = pitcher_row)

counterfactual_babip <- predict(
  babip_model,
  newdata = cf_row
)

current_babip
counterfactual_babip

counterfactual_babip - current_babip
```

```{r}
teams = c(
  "Diamondbacks", "Dodgers", "Giants", "Padres", "Rockies",
  "Cubs", "Cardinals", "Brewers", "Pirates", "Reds",
  "Braves", "Mets", "Nationals", "Marlins", "Phillies",
  "Angels", "Athletics", "Astros", "Mariners", "Rangers",
  "Royals", "Tigers", "Guardians", "White Sox", "Twins",
  "Yankees", "Red Sox", "Orioles", "Rays", "Blue Jays"
)

team_map = c(
  "AZ" = "Diamondbacks",
  "ATL" = "Braves",
  "BAL" = "Orioles",
  "BOS" = "Red Sox",
  "CHC" = "Cubs",
  "CWS" = "White Sox",
  "CIN" = "Reds",
  "CLE" = "Guardians",
  "COL" = "Rockies",
  "DET" = "Tigers",
  "HOU" = "Astros",
  "KC" = "Royals",
  "ANA" = "Angels",
  "LAN" = "Dodgers",
  "MIA" = "Marlins",
  "MIL" = "Brewers",
  "MIN" = "Twins",
  "NYM" = "Mets",
  "NYY" = "Yankees",
  "OAK" = "Athletics",
  "PHI" = "Phillies",
  "PIT" = "Pirates",
  "SD" = "Padres",
  "SEA" = "Mariners",
  "SF" = "Giants",
  "STL" = "Cardinals",
  "TB" = "Rays",
  "TEX" = "Rangers",
  "TOR" = "Blue Jays",
  "WSH" = "Nationals"
)

data(People)

lg_average = read_csv("lg_average.csv")
```

```{r}
ui = fluidPage(
  p("Hello! Please enter a player's name and a team name. The aim of this app is to determine the best situation for a pitcher. Choose a team that the pitcher is not currently on and then we will determine if that team is a better situation for the pitcher."),
  textInput("pitcher", "Pitcher Name"),
  selectInput("team", "New Team", teams),
  actionButton("submit","Run Simulation"),
  br(),
  br(),
  textOutput("result"),
  tableOutput("stats")
)
```

```{r}
server = function(input, output) {
  
  simulation_results <- eventReactive(input$submit, {
    
    pitcher <- input$pitcher
    new_team <- input$team
    
    player_id <- People %>%
      mutate(full_name = paste(nameFirst, nameLast)) %>%
      filter(full_name == input$pitcher) %>%
      pull(playerID)
    
    pitching = Pitching %>%
      dplyr::select(playerID, teamID, yearID, W,  L, IPouts, H, ER, HR, BB, HBP, SO, ERA) %>%
      filter(playerID == player_id) %>%
      mutate(IP = IPouts / 3) %>%
      mutate(WHIP = 3*(H + BB)/IPouts) %>%
      mutate(SOper9 = (SO / IP) * 9) %>%
      mutate(SOperBB = SO / BB) %>%
      arrange(desc(yearID))
    
    averages = lg_average %>%
      filter(Year == pitching$yearID[1])
    
    pitching_metrics = pitching %>%
      mutate(ERAplus = 100 * (averages$ERA[1] / ERA))
    
    # EXAMPLE PLACEHOLDER VALUES
    projected_era_plus = 100
    
    pitching = pitching %>%
      mutate(teamID = recode(teamID, !!!team_map))
    team = pitching$teamID[1]
    if (projected_era_plus > pitching_metrics$ERAplus[1]) {
      team = new_team
    }
    
    result <- paste(
      "The better situation for",
      pitcher,
      "is the",
      team
    )
    
    
    list(
      result = result,
      pitching_metrics = pitching_metrics
    )
  })
  
  output$result <- renderText({
    simulation_results()$result
  })
  
  output$stats <- renderTable({
    simulation_results()$pitching_metrics
  })
}

```

```{r}
shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
```
